title: Mission Rewards Earned
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS missions FROM MissionCompleted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {missions} contract(s) fulfilled earning {total} Cr in combined mission rewards during the report period. Mission payouts range from a few thousand credits for simple courier runs to hundreds of millions for high-risk assassination or wing massacre contracts.
details.help: MissionCompleted.Reward is the credit payout at completion. total drives the title metric.

tagLines: Mission completion data logged. The Pilots Federation updates your contractor rating accordingly.
That's a lot of contracts fulfilled. Someone out there is very grateful. Probably.
Every credit here is a promise kept — to a faction, a station, or a stranger who needed a pilot.
